creator: john@saltant.com
text:
Created attachment 179401
sysutils/py-iocage: Limit python support to v2.7

Upstream specifies python 2.7 as a requirement [0]. Until upstream supports python3, the port should explicitly require python2.7.

[0] https://github.com/iocage/iocage/blob/0.9.3/README.md see "REQUIREMENTS"
